reviews.text: Liked: It's really hard to find a hotel with a room for a family of 3. But in this one they have the option! We stayed at a room with one big bed (queen or king size) and another single bed in a separate space. It was not separated by a door but you may have some intimacy. The bathroom was so spacious with a bath and a shower. The breakfast was good. The service was not fast, but it's good you can order some dishes apart from the buffet. The hotel overall is nice and cosy. The area is nice, you can walk around during the day time and enjoy see view from the restaurant. I recommend you to use transfer service from the airport to the hotel. It was really nice! | Disliked: Every time I came back to my room the were some staff coming and knocking to the door asking if I needed any service. Some may think it's nice, but I found it bothering. Windows were regulated, it was possible to open the windows just a little bit, and not all of them!

reviews.text:
Liked: Lovely courtyard, friendly helpful staff and location on the promenade good. Breakfast had a great selection. | Disliked: Early flight so we were at the hotel by 9. Quickly told we would have to pay for breakfast if we would like to avail ourselves, a welcome complimentary coffee might have been a nice touch. Receptionist said she would contact housekeeping to hurry along our room but normal check in was 2, even after a couple of checks we weren’t contacted until 2.10. I understand how someone has to leave the room before it can be serviced for the next guest but I can’t believe we were the last guest to arrive. 
Heard a guest saying their partner had a stomach bug, receptionist said it was the 5th guest he’d heard about that morning. Two days later we succumbed???
reviews.text_liked: Lovely courtyard, friendly helpful staff and location on the promenade good. Breakfast had a great selection.
reviews.text_disliked:
Early flight so we were at the hotel by 9. Quickly told we would have to pay for breakfast if we would like to avail ourselves, a welcome complimentary coffee might have been a nice touch. Receptionist said she would contact housekeeping to hurry along our room but normal check in was 2, even after a couple of checks we weren’t contacted until 2.10. I understand how someone has to leave the room before it can be serviced for the next guest but I can’t believe we were the last guest to arrive. 
Heard a guest saying their partner had a stomach bug, receptionist said it was the 5th guest he’d heard about that morning. Two days later we succumbed???
reviews.owner_answer:
Dear Stephen, 
Thank you for taking the time to share your detailed feedback.
We are pleased to hear that you enjoyed our courtyard, location, breakfast selection, and the friendliness of our team. Your kind comments in this regard are truly appreciated.
We sincerely apologise for the inconvenience you experienced upon your early arrival. 
While our standard check-in time is 14:00, we always aim to accommodate guests as early as possible when rooms become available. 
We regret that we did not communicate more proactively with you regarding your room status, and we understand how disappointing this must have been after an early flight.
For guests arriving very early in the morning, we generally recommend reserving the room from the night prior, as this allows for immediate access upon arrival. 
This helps ensure a more comfortable and seamless experience after long or early journeys.
We are also sorry that your initial experience at breakfast did not meet your expectations. 
Your suggestion regarding a complimentary coffee is appreciated and will be shared with our team for consideration.
Regarding your health concerns, we take guest wellbeing extremely seriously. 
We maintain strict hygiene and sanitation protocols throughout the hotel, and we regret to hear that you became unwell.
Your feedback has been shared with our management and front office teams to ensure that these areas are addressed and improved going forward. 
We truly value your comments, as they help us enhance our service standards.
We appreciate you bringing these matters to our attention and hope to have the opportunity to welcome you back in the future for a more positive experience.
Kindest Regards, 
Mukhtar Pillay 
Front Office Manager.

reviews.text: Liked: The Winchester is an incredible hotel. It has vintage charm with all modern amenities with beautiful views of the beach and sunsets. The other side looks out on Table Mountain and Signal Hill. Breakfast is generally included with a fabulous buffet in addition to a la carte menu items to satisfy most tastes. The garden courtyard is mesmerizing with climbing flowering greenery up the sides of the cloistered hallway on the upper floors. The swimming pool is beautiful with comfortably padded longe chairs for relaxing. The staff are kind and go above and beyond. The Winchester is one of the best hotels we have experienced in 40 years of travelling around the world. | Disliked: Nothing

reviews.text: Liked: Let's talk about the breakfast options. Incredible. There is a continental buffet and you get to order a warm breakfast as well from the menu. Comfortable rooms with satellite television, although no time to watch as you're in Sea Point and who wants to be in their rooms when you have all of that within your reach. Great location, park and explore. Great restaurants within reach with the Waterfront and CBD just a couple of minutes away. Access to the promenade is a breeze for morning walks. Beds are comfortable with a great duvet which, during our visit in Winter was delightful. Pillows are thick though so if you're not used to it, might be challenging but don't let that take away from the experience. Parking available at R85 per vehicle per day behind a closed gate. Two restaurants on site make in-house dining a breeze. | Disliked: The mini bar was not stocked and only upon checkout when we mentioned this, was told that there is an option available but you need to request that during check in. We did not know and was not offered this option.

reviews.review_title: Lovely stay but the Winchester  has become expensive  and the service not as good as it used to be.
reviews.owner_answer:
Dear Camilla, 
Thank you for taking the time to share your honest feedback about your recent stay at The Winchester. We are delighted to hear that you enjoyed our breakfast buffet, found your room comfortable, and appreciated the charm and cheerfulness of our staff.
However, we apologize sincerely for the issues that marred your stay. 
We understand that our prices may have increased, and we'll take this into consideration during our future pricing reviews.
Regarding the service, we are deeply sorry to hear that it didn't meet your expectations. 
We will address the issues you have raised, including the delayed room cleaning, slow service at breakfast and in the evening, and the forgetfulness of our staff.
We will use your feedback to retrain our staff and improve our processes to prevent such issues from happening again. 
We appreciate your kind words about our staff's charm and cheerfulness, and we will ensure that they receive the necessary support to provide exceptional service.
Thank you for your loyalty to The Winchester, and we hope to have the opportunity to serve you better in the future.
Kindest Regards, 
Mukhtar
reviews.author: Camilla
